canonical_answer: A person wearing a glossy black Darth Vader helmet and a blue plaid button-down shirt sits on a dark brown leather sofa. They raise both hands to shoulder height with fingers curled or pinched. A beige wall with a white light switch plate is visible behind them to the right. Warm lighting reflects off the helmet's surface.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: The background shifts to a dark blue night sky filled with small white stars and a large spherical celestial body partially illuminated on the left. White text reading 'An Altered Deal Production' appears centered in the upper portion of the frame. A dark silhouette of terrain lies below the planet. The person wearing the helmet is no longer visible in the final frames.

question: Describe the sequence of hand gestures performed by the person wearing the Darth Vader helmet throughout the video.
canonical_answer: At 4s, a person wearing a Darth Vader helmet sits on a sofa; at 6s, they raise their right hand; at 8s, both hands are raised with fingers pinched; at 12s, index fingers point upwards; at 18s, the person reappears raising their right index finger.

question: Describe the visual transitions and scene changes observed from the beginning to the end of the video.
canonical_answer: At 0s, an intro screen with text appears; at 4s, the scene changes to a person in a helmet on a sofa; at 14s, the scene becomes empty; at 18s, the person reappears raising a hand.
